code:
mut n = 1
mut c3 = 1
mut c5 = 1
while n <= 15
  let is3 = c3 == 3
  let is5 = c5 == 3
  if is3 and is5
    println("FizzBuzz")
  else if is3
    println("Fizz")
  else if is5
    println("Buzz")
  else
    println("#{n}")
  end
  if is3
    c3 = 1
  else
    c3 = c3 + 1
  end
  if is5
    c5 = 1
  else
    c5 = c5 + 1
  end
  n = n + 1
end
